description: South African braai favourites adapted to be Huntress-friendly, gluten-conscious and onion-free.

groups.description: The stars of the fire. High-protein braai meals designed to be Huntress-friendly and easy to prepare.

recipes.name: Garlic & Herb Chicken Sosaties
recipes.description: Tender chicken skewers marinated in garlic and herbs.
foxNotes: Great first braai recipe to master.
recipes.imagePrompt: Chicken sosaties cooking over South African braai coals, rustic outdoor photography

recipes.name: Beef Sosaties
recipes.description: Traditional beef sosaties adapted to avoid onion-heavy marinades.
foxNotes: Excellent for weekend braais.
recipes.imagePrompt: Beef sosaties grilling over open coals, traditional South African braai photography

recipes.name: Steak with Rosemary Butter
recipes.description: Simple steak elevated with homemade rosemary butter.
foxNotes: One of the highest reward-to-effort meals.
recipes.imagePrompt: Juicy steak with rosemary butter beside braai fire, premium outdoor food photography

recipes.name: Bacon Wrapped Chicken
recipes.description: Chicken breasts wrapped in bacon and braaied until crispy.
instructions: Cook until chicken is done and bacon is crisp.
foxNotes: Almost impossible not to enjoy.
recipes.imagePrompt: Bacon wrapped chicken cooking on braai grid, rustic South African food photography

recipes.name: Lemon Garlic Chicken Thighs
recipes.description: Juicy chicken thighs with lemon and garlic marinade.
foxNotes: Extremely forgiving recipe for beginner braai masters.
recipes.imagePrompt: Golden lemon garlic chicken thighs on braai grill, warm outdoor photography

groups.description: The supporting cast of the braai. These sides are gluten-free, onion-free and designed to pair perfectly with meats cooked over the fire.

recipes.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes
recipes.description: Sweet potato wedges roasted until crispy on the outside and soft inside.
foxNotes: A guaranteed safe side dish.
recipes.imagePrompt: Golden roasted sweet potato wedges in rustic serving dish, South African braai photography

recipes.name: Braaied Butternut
recipes.description: Caramelised butternut cooked over the coals until sweet and tender.
instructions: Cook until tender and lightly charred.
foxNotes: Works with almost every braai protein.
recipes.imagePrompt: Caramelised butternut roasting over braai coals, rustic outdoor food photography

recipes.name: Garlic Baby Potatoes
recipes.description: Foil-wrapped baby potatoes cooked with garlic butter.
foxNotes: One of the easiest braai sides to prepare.
recipes.imagePrompt: Garlic butter baby potatoes in foil tray beside braai fire, rustic South African cooking

recipes.name: Cheese Stuffed Mushrooms
recipes.description: Large mushrooms filled with cheese and cooked until bubbling.
instructions: Cook on braai until cheese melts.
foxNotes: Looks impressive with very little effort.
recipes.imagePrompt: Cheese stuffed mushrooms cooking on braai grid, rustic outdoor food photography

recipes.name: GF Braaibroodjie
recipes.description: A gluten-free version of the South African favourite.
foxNotes: Lets the Huntress enjoy a braai classic.
recipes.imagePrompt: Golden gluten free braaibroodjie toasted over braai coals, traditional South African photography

recipes.name: Foil Packet Veggies
recipes.description: Simple vegetables cooked in foil directly on the coals.
foxNotes: Extremely versatile and difficult to mess up.
recipes.imagePrompt: Foil packet vegetables cooking over braai coals, rustic outdoor food photography

recipes.name: Foil Potatoes
recipes.description: Simple foil-wrapped potatoes cooked slowly in the coals until soft and fluffy.
foxNotes: One of the easiest braai sides ever.
recipes.imagePrompt: Foil wrapped potatoes cooking beside glowing braai coals, rustic outdoor photography

recipes.name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipes.description: Large mushrooms filled with cheese and herbs cooked over the braai.
foxNotes: Looks much fancier than the effort required.
recipes.imagePrompt: Stuffed mushrooms cooking on braai grill, rustic South African outdoor food photography

recipes.name: Braaied Peaches
recipes.description: Sweet peaches lightly caramelised over the coals.
foxNotes: Excellent with vanilla ice cream.
recipes.imagePrompt: Caramelised peaches cooking on braai grill, golden sunset outdoor photography

recipes.name: Cinnamon Braai Apples
recipes.description: Warm apples cooked with cinnamon until soft and fragrant.
instructions: Fill centres with cinnamon and honey.
foxNotes: Smells incredible while cooking.
recipes.imagePrompt: Foil wrapped cinnamon apples beside braai coals, cozy outdoor dessert photography

recipes.name: The Fox & Huntress Braai
recipes.description: The signature braai platter of the cookbook featuring a balanced selection of meat, vegetables and braai favourites.
instructions: Prepare the fire and allow coals to become medium-hot.
Wrap potatoes in foil and place on the braai first.
Season steak with salt and pepper.
Place steak and sosaties on the grill.
Brush mushrooms with melted butter and garlic powder.
Braai mushrooms and mealies until cooked.
Turn meats regularly for even cooking.
Allow steak to rest before slicing.
Serve everything together on a large sharing platter.
foxNotes: The official braai platter of the cookbook.
recipes.imagePrompt: Large South African braai platter with steak, sosaties, potatoes and vegetables arranged on rustic wooden table

recipes.name: Summer Braai Platter
recipes.description: A lighter braai platter designed for warm summer afternoons.
instructions: Season chicken with olive oil, salt and pepper.
Cook mushrooms and mealies over medium coals.
Arrange everything on a large serving platter.
foxNotes: Excellent for hot KwaZulu-Natal afternoons.
recipes.imagePrompt: Fresh summer braai platter with grilled chicken, mealies, grapes and salad on outdoor patio

recipes.name: Winter Braai Platter
recipes.description: A hearty braai platter built for colder evenings around the fire.
instructions: Wrap potatoes in foil and cook first.
Season steak and braai to preferred doneness.
Brush mushrooms with butter and garlic powder.
Arrange on a large serving platter.
foxNotes: Made for winter evenings around the fire.
recipes.imagePrompt: Hearty winter braai platter with steak, boerewors, foil potatoes and mushrooms beside firepit

groups.description: Fresh braai salads designed to complement fire-cooked meats while remaining Huntress-friendly.

recipes.name: Greek Salad (Onion Free)
recipes.description: A refreshing Greek-style salad adapted to be completely onion free.
foxNotes: Pairs with almost every braai protein.
recipes.imagePrompt: Fresh onion free Greek salad with feta and olives, summer braai photography

recipes.name: Potato Salad (Onion Free)
recipes.description: A creamy potato salad without onions but full of flavour.
foxNotes: The salad most people expect at a braai.
recipes.imagePrompt: Creamy onion free potato salad in rustic serving bowl, South African braai photography

recipes.name: Cucumber & Feta Salad
recipes.description: A cool and refreshing salad perfect for hot summer braais.
foxNotes: Excellent for summer braais.
recipes.imagePrompt: Cucumber and feta salad in rustic bowl, refreshing summer braai photography

recipes.name: Carrot & Apple Salad
recipes.description: A sweet and crunchy salad that balances richer braai foods.
foxNotes: A surprisingly good pairing with beef.
recipes.imagePrompt: Fresh carrot and apple salad in rustic serving bowl, colourful braai side photography

groups.description: Simple sauces, bastes and dressings that elevate a braai without introducing ingredients that may upset the Huntress.

recipes.name: Garlic Butter Baste
recipes.description: A rich garlic butter baste that works beautifully with chicken, steak and fish.
foxNotes: The most useful baste in the cookbook.
recipes.imagePrompt: Melted garlic butter baste in rustic bowl beside braai fire, outdoor cooking photography

recipes.name: Lemon Herb Baste
recipes.description: A fresh citrus baste perfect for chicken and seafood.
foxNotes: Excellent on chicken thighs and hake.
recipes.imagePrompt: Fresh lemon herb baste with rosemary and thyme, rustic outdoor food photography

recipes.name: Honey Mustard Dressing
recipes.description: A sweet and tangy dressing for salads and grilled meats.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
foxNotes: Fantastic on Greek salad.
recipes.imagePrompt: Honey mustard dressing in glass jar beside fresh salad ingredients, cookbook photography

recipes.name: Herb Yogurt Sauce
recipes.description: A cool and creamy sauce that balances smoky braai flavours.
foxNotes: Excellent with sosaties and chicken.
recipes.imagePrompt: Creamy herb yogurt sauce in rustic bowl, fresh outdoor dining photography
